seoTitle: Lilli Pilli vs Lillian Rock — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lilli Pilli and Lillian Rock. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lilli Pilli vs Lillian Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lilli Pilli and Lillian Rock.
heading: Lilli Pilli vs Lillian Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lilli Pilli, New South Wales and Lillian Rock, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lillian Rock has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lilli Pilli (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lilli Pilli or Lillian Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lilli Pilli has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Lillian Rock scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lilli Pilli scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Lillian Rock scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lilli Pilli or Lillian Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lillian Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
